author: aurora trevino
text: I recently hired a plumber in Dunwoody to replace both my main water line and sewer line, and I couldn't be happier with the experience. Bryan, the plumber who helped me out, really knew his stuff and took the time to explain everything in simple terms so I understood what was happening with my pipes. The job was done quickly and professionally, and the customer service was fantastic from start to finish. The workmanship was excellent, and the price was fair for such a big job. If you need reliable plumbing work, especially for things like main water line or sewer line replacement, I definitely recommend giving them a call.

author: Judith Stone
text: Sandy Springs Plumbing Heating Air Conditioning did an amazing job with my bathroom plumbing project. Jay was the plumber who helped me, and he explained every step of the process in a way that was easy to understand. I didn’t know much about bathroom plumbing work, but he made sure I felt comfortable with everything they were doing. They moved my shower, sink, and toilet to make the space work better for me, and the difference is huge—the bathroom feels much more open now. The team had to take out all the old drywall and update both the pipes and some wiring, but they handled it all quickly and efficiently. They also retiled the floor and shower, and the work looks beautiful. When they put the drywall back up, everything looked neat and finished. Now, my bathroom looks completely new, and I couldn’t be happier with the results. The whole process was smooth and stress-free, and I’m really impressed with the quality of their plumbing work.

author: Brandi Snyder
text: I was so relieved when I called for help with my clogged kitchen sink and the plumber was able to come out to my home in Dunwoody the same day. Levi showed up right on time and was both friendly and professional. He quickly figured out what was causing the blockage and got straight to work clearing out the pipe. Levi explained each step as he worked and made sure everything stayed clean and tidy. In less than an hour, my kitchen sink was draining perfectly again. The price was fair, and Levi stood by his work, so I feel confident the repair will last. If I ever need a plumber again, I’ll definitely reach out and ask for Levi. The service was fast and high-quality, and I’m so happy to have my kitchen working properly. I’d recommend this plumbing company to anyone in Dunwoody who needs a reliable and skilled plumber.

author: Joshua Humphrey
text: The service I received was outstanding! Everyone was very professional and really went the extra mile to help with my plumbing emergency. They made sure my water issue was handled quickly and took it seriously from start to finish. Jay, the plumber who came out, was fantastic and clearly takes great pride in his work. He worked hard and didn’t leave until everything was fixed, even though it took much longer than we thought. If you want honest, reliable plumbers who do the job right, I would definitely recommend Sandy Springs Plumbing Heating Air Conditioning.

author: Brent4 P
text: Here’s your revised review, following all requirements: I always call Sandy Springs Plumbing Heating Air Conditioning whenever I have plumbing problems. Their team does an outstanding job and gets everything fixed right the first time, so I never have to worry about calling them back. I live in an older home, and they’ve updated my pipes and fixtures so everything works great now. Their plumbers, like Todd, are highly trained and can handle any plumbing issue you might have. Everyone I’ve met from this company is professional, friendly, and truly cares about helping you out. Their repairs and renovations are always top quality, and you can tell they take real pride in their work. I feel completely comfortable letting them work in my home, even if I need to step out, because I know they are trustworthy and reliable. After using several other companies in the past, I can honestly say this one stands out as the best. Their prices are fair and they always look for the most affordable options for parts and service. I recommend them to all my friends and neighbors and am confident anyone will be happy with the results. They offer emergency plumbing services on nights and weekends, which is a huge relief if something goes wrong unexpectedly. Besides plumbing, they can also help with air conditioning and heating needs. If you want the job done right, quickly, and at a good price, this is the company to call. After my experience, I don’t want anyone else taking care of my plumbing. Every plumber who has worked on my house, including Jay, has shown honesty and skill. They truly care about the community and always give five-star service. Special thanks to Levi for his excellent work today—it was really impressive.
